top_signals.title: Oil prices fall on mounting hopes for de-escalation in US-Iran War - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Oil prices fall on mounting hopes for de-escalation in US-Iran War  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Pelican Products Make Big Bet On Defense
top_signals.summary: Pelican Products CEO JC Curleigh joins Open Interest to talk about how the iconic protective case maker is finding fresh momentum in defense, as drones reshape military logistics. He details why Pelican is partnering earlier with defense innovators, how US factories are scaling production, and why premium protection still commands premium pricing. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Goldman's Flood Says Share Sales Signal 'Healthy' Market
top_signals.summary: John Flood, a Goldman Sachs partner, expects the robust demand for recent share sales to continue. Speaking on Bloomberg Television, Flood says Friday's selloff presents a buying opportunity and thinks there's a "slight disconnect" between retail and institutional investors. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Gold Erases This Year’s Gains as Jobs Data Fuel Fed-Hike Bets - Bloomberg
top_signals.summary: Gold Erases This Year’s Gains as Jobs Data Fuel Fed-Hike Bets  Bloomberg
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Google to pay SpaceX $920 million a month for compute capacity at xAI data centers
top_signals.summary: Ahead of a planned IPO, SpaceX inked a deal to rent compute capacity to Google for $920 million per month for 32 months.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.summary: Dollar Gains After Hot Jobs Data as Traders Price In Rate Hikes  Bloomberg

top_signals.summary: Deal with Wall Street watchdog resolves civil investigation as fund manager’s former star trader awaits criminal trial
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Gabriela Santos on How to Start $800K Savings Plan
top_signals.summary: Gabriela Santos, chief market strategist for the Americas at JPMorgan Asset Management , joins Scarlet Fu and Tom Keene on "Bloomberg Money." (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Cash Isn't Always King: JPMorgan's Santos
top_signals.summary: Gabriela Santos, chief market strategist for the Americas at JPMorgan Asset Management, joins Scarlet Fu and Tom Keene on "Bloomberg Money." (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Wall Street Sours on Lululemon Shares After Sales Outlook Cut
top_signals.summary: Only one Wall Street analyst still rates Lululemon Athletica Inc. as a buy after the upscale yogawear company cut its annual forecast amid slumping sales in North America.
